ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of work experience */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the customer's residence */,
  "family" INTEGER /* Number of family members */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level (1: high school, 2: college, 3: graduate) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, self-employed) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the customer (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings, credit card) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "cca_avg" REAL /* Average credit card balance */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, closed, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was last updated */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction on the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was last updated */,
  "is_fraudulent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the transaction is flagged as potentially fraudulent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who took the loan */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "repayment_date" TEXT /* Date by which the loan must be repaid */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., approved, disbursed, paid off) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the loan record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the loan record was last updated */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment made towards the loan */,
  "remaining_balance" REAL /* Remaining balance of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_cards" (
  "credit_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit card */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the credit card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card (e.g., visa, mastercard) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the credit card */,
  "limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the credit card */,
  "card_status" TEXT /* Status of the credit card (e.g., active, suspended, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the credit card record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the credit card record was last updated */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction on the credit card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities_accounts" (
  "securities_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each securities account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the securities account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of securities account (e.g., stocks, bonds) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the securities account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the securities account (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the securities account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the securities account was last updated */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction on the securities account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("securities_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cd_accounts" (
  "cd_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CD account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the CD account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of CD account (e.g., 6-month, 1-year) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the CD account */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date when the CD account matures */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the CD account (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the CD account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the CD account was last updated */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction on the CD account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cd_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cd_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "online_accounts" (
  "online_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each online account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the online account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of online account (e.g., online banking, online investing) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the online account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the online account (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the online account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the online account was last updated */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction on the online account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("online_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_online_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
